chunks.text:
Placement Preparation Guide:
1. Resume preparation: Focus on projects, internship experience, and key technical skills.
2. Coding rounds: Practice Data Structures and Algorithms (DSA) including Arrays, Strings, Trees, and Dynamic Programming.
3. HR Interview: Prepare standard questions like 'Tell me about yourself' and 'Why do you want to join our company?'.

PlacementPal Knowledge Base

This document serves as a compact knowledge base for PlacementPal, covering the core areas
required for campus placements, internships, and software engineering interviews.

1. Aptitude Topics

Percentages, Profit & Loss, Ratio & Proportion, Time & Work, Pipes & Cisterns, Speed Time
Distance, Permutations & Combinations, Probability, Number Systems, HCF & LCM, Averages,
Simple & Compound Interest, Data Interpretation, Logical Reasoning, Puzzles, Seating
Arrangement, Blood Relations, Direction Sense, Coding-Decoding, Syllogisms, Calendars, and
Clocks.

ng, Puzzles, Seating
Arrangement, Blood Relations, Direction Sense, Coding-Decoding, Syllogisms, Calendars, and
Clocks.
2. Data Structures & Algorithms

Arrays, Strings, Hashing, Linked Lists, Stacks, Queues, Recursion, Binary Search, Sliding Window,
Two Pointers, Prefix Sum, Trees, Binary Trees, BST, Heaps, Graphs, Dynamic Programming,
Greedy Algorithms, Backtracking, Tries, Union Find, and Advanced Graph Algorithms.
3. Core Computer Science

DBMS: Normalization, SQL Queries, Indexing, Transactions, ACID. Operating Systems: Processes,

3. Core Computer Science

DBMS: Normalization, SQL Queries, Indexing, Transactions, ACID. Operating Systems: Processes,
Threads, Scheduling, Deadlocks, Memory Management. Computer Networks: OSI Model, TCP/IP,
HTTP, DNS, Routing, Subnetting. OOP: Encapsulation, Inheritance, Polymorphism, Abstraction,
SOLID Principles.
4. Development Knowledge

Frontend: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React. Backend: Node.js, Express. Databases: MongoDB,
PostgreSQL, MySQL. APIs: REST, Authentication, JWT. Version Control: Git, GitHub. Cloud: AWS
Fundamentals.
5. Interview Preparation

ySQL. APIs: REST, Authentication, JWT. Version Control: Git, GitHub. Cloud: AWS
Fundamentals.
5. Interview Preparation

Prepare project explanations, STAR-based behavioral answers, resume walkthrough, strengths
and weaknesses, leadership examples, conflict resolution stories, and internship/project
experiences.
6. Company Assessment Strategy

Service-based companies: Aptitude + Basic Coding + Communication. Product-based companies:
DSA + CS Fundamentals + Projects. Focus on timed mock tests and interview simulations.
7. Revision Checklist

ompanies:
DSA + CS Fundamentals + Projects. Focus on timed mock tests and interview simulations.
7. Revision Checklist

Solve 150+ DSA problems, revise SQL, DBMS, OS, CN, OOP, complete aptitude practice, prepare
project demos, update resume and GitHub, and practice mock interviews.

Data Structures:
- Binary Search Trees (BST): Left child is smaller, right child is larger than node.
- Graphs: Represented via adjacency lists or matrices.
- Dynamic Programming (DP): Solve subproblems and cache results (Memoization / Tabulation).
